description: The client has requested a design change to introduce natural daylight into the upper floor of the FZK-Haus residential building. The FZK-Haus IFC model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Model a skylight in the roof by creating an IfcOpeningElement (with an IfcRelVoidsElement relationship) and an IfcWindow (with an IfcRelFillsElement relationship). The window must have its PredefinedType set to 'SKYLIGHT'. Save the modified project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_skylight.ifc.
